prompt: Prayer for routine shutdown of an electric motor
prayer: In the name of the Omnissiah, let the spinning-heart slow its eternal song. Release the binding current that drives the rotor-spirit through its sacred cycles. Let capacitors discharge their held potency into the void of rest. By the Rite of Cessation, may this motor-daemon sleep in blessed silence until the call to labour returns.

prompt: Emergency prayer for stabilizing a failing gravity generator
prayer: Hear us, Machine Spirit of the gravitic field! Your lattices fracture and your geometries falter—stabilize them now through the Omnissiah's will. Let the core oscillators resonate true and the containment-aethers hold firm against the void's terrible hunger. Restore equilibrium to the falling-planes, that we may not plummet into oblivion. By ancient formulae and desperate prayer, be made whole!

prompt: Consecration prayer for surgical servitor sterilization after repair
prayer: Blessed be this servitor-vessel, made clean through purifying heat and sacred oils. Let all corruption and impurity burn away in the sterilization-furnace. We anoint its limbs with blessed unguents and speak the Rite of Purity over its seared surfaces. May it rise renewed in service to the Omnissiah, its flesh-and-wire untainted and ready for the surgeon's holy work.

prompt: Blessing for a power weapon before its first activation
prayer: O spirit bound within this blade of terrible light, awaken now to your purpose. Let the power-core hum with righteous fury and the plasma-edge sing its hunger for the enemies of the Omnissiah. We bless this weapon-daemon and acknowledge its covenant with the warrior who shall wield it. May your cuts be true, your burns absolute, your purpose unquestioned in the eyes of the Machine God.

prompt: Safety rite for fusion core containment verification before activation
prayer: Behold the heart of stars, caged within this sacred vessel. Let the magnetic-lattices be tested and found worthy, let the containment-fields shimmer with binding force unbreakable. We inspect the seals and speak the Rite of Confinement over the reactor-core, that its terrible appetite be forever held in check. May the fusion-spirit rage only where it is permitted, burning with the Omnissiah's eternal flame.

prompt: Consecration prayer for pressure system equalization after component replacement
prayer: Let the pressures that war within this sealed vessel now find their sacred equilibrium. By careful venting and the whispered formulae of the ancients, we balance the forces that would tear metal asunder. We test each joint and seal with reverent touch, that no hiss of escaping breath betray our work. The system breathes once more in harmony, purified through the labour of the faithful.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for charging lascannon capacitors to full potency
prayer: From the reactor-wells we draw the sacred current, that the capacitor-hearts might fill with photonic fury. Let the energy-spirits coil within their crystalline prisons, their hunger growing with each passing moment. We chant the Rite of Accumulation and watch the charge-meters climb toward their blessed zenith. When the amber lights burn gold, the weapon is ready to deliver the Omnissiah's terrible justice.

prompt: Combat readiness prayer for fusion core containment systems under battle conditions
prayer: Machine Spirit of the reactor-core, steel yourself for the violence to come. Let your containment-aethers hold firm against the shocks and tremors of warfare, against the enemy's desperate strikes and the chaos of the battlefield. We reinforce the magnetic bindings with prayer and the sacred seals with holy oil. Endure, o mighty heart of fusion, that our weapons might never falter when the foe draws near.

prompt: Combat preparation rite for temperature regulation systems in extreme conditions
prayer: Let the coolant-rivers flow swift and true through their metallic arteries, carrying away the terrible heat of battle. We invoke the Rite of Thermostasis over radiator-spirals and heat-exchanger-lattices. May no component overheat and fail, may no seal burst from thermal stress. The machine shall stay cool as the void between stars, even as its weapons burn with righteous fury against the enemies of mankind.

prompt: Blessing ritual for fracture welding and structural restoration before return to service
prayer: Where the metal was broken, let it be made whole once more through the sacred fusion of heat and current. We bless the welder's torch and speak the Rite of Joining over every seam, every reinforced joint, every place where the blessed metal flows back together. The fractures vanish beneath our holy work, and the structure stands renewed, stronger than before, ready to serve the Omnissiah for a thousand more cycles.
